api_types.name: ControllerHealth
api_types.doc: ControllerHealth defines the health configs.

fields.name: HealthProbeBindAddress
fields.doc: healthProbeBindAddress is the TCP address that the controller should bind to for serving health probes It can be set to "0" or "" to disable serving the health probe. Defaults to ":8081".

fields.name: ReadinessEndpointName
fields.doc: readinessEndpointName is the name for the readiness endpoint. Defaults to "readyz".

fields.name: LivenessEndpointName
fields.doc: livenessEndpointName is the name for the liveness endpoint. Defaults to "healthz".

api_types.name: ControllerConfigurationSpec
api_types.doc: ControllerConfigurationSpec defines the global configuration for controllers registered with the manager.

fields.name: GroupKindConcurrency
fields.doc: groupKindConcurrency is a map from a Kind to the number of concurrent reconciliation allowed for that controller. When a controller is registered within this manager using the builder utilities, users have to specify the type the controller reconciles in the For(...) call. If the object's kind passed matches one of the keys in this map, the concurrency for that controller is set to the number specified. The key is expected to be consistent in form with GroupKind.String(), e.g. TrainJob.trainer.kubeflow.org. Defaults to empty map, which means no limits.

api_types.name: CertManagement
api_types.doc: CertManagement holds configuration related to webhook server certificate generation.

fields.name: Enable
fields.doc: enable controls whether the cert management is enabled. If disabled, certificates must be provided externally. Defaults to true.

fields.name: WebhookServiceName
fields.doc: webhookServiceName is the name of the Service used as part of the DNSName when generating the webhook server certificate. Defaults to "kubeflow-trainer-controller-manager".

fields.name: WebhookSecretName
fields.doc: webhookSecretName is the name of the Secret used to store the CA and server certificates. Defaults to "kubeflow-trainer-webhook-cert".

api_types.name: ClientConnection
api_types.doc: ClientConnection provides additional configuration options for Kubernetes API server client.

fields.name: QPS
fields.doc: qps controls the number of queries per second allowed before client-side throttling connection to the API server. Defaults to 50.

fields.name: Burst
fields.doc: burst allows extra queries to accumulate when a client is not using its full QPS allocation. Defaults to 100.

api_types.name: Configuration
api_types.doc: Configuration is the Schema for the Kubeflow Trainer controller manager configuration.

fields.name: Webhook
fields.doc: webhook contains the controllers webhook configuration.

fields.name: LeaderElection
fields.doc: leaderElection is the LeaderElection config to be used when configuring the manager.Manager leader election.

fields.name: Metrics
fields.doc: metrics contains the controller metrics configuration.

fields.name: Health
fields.doc: health contains the controller health configuration.

fields.name: Controller
fields.doc: controller contains global configuration options for controllers registered within this manager.

fields.name: CertManagement
fields.doc: certManagement is configuration for certificate management used by the webhook server.

fields.name: ClientConnection
fields.doc: clientConnection provides additional configuration options for Kubernetes API server client.

api_types.name: ControllerWebhook
api_types.doc: ControllerWebhook defines the webhook server for the controller.

fields.name: Port
fields.doc: port is the port that the webhook server serves at. It is used to set webhook.Server.Port. Defaults to 9443.

fields.name: Host
fields.doc: host is the hostname that the webhook server binds to. It is used to set webhook.Server.Host. Defaults to "" (all interfaces).

api_types.name: ControllerMetrics
api_types.doc: ControllerMetrics defines the metrics configs.

fields.name: BindAddress
fields.doc: bindAddress is the TCP address that the controller should bind to for serving prometheus metrics. It can be set to "0" to disable the metrics serving. Defaults to ":8443".

fields.name: SecureServing
fields.doc: secureServing determines if the metrics endpoint should be served securely via HTTPS. Defaults to true.

api_types.name: TrainingRuntimeSpec
api_types.doc: TrainingRuntimeSpec represents a specification of the desired training runtime.

fields.name: MLPolicy
fields.doc: mlPolicy provides the ML-specific parameters for the model training.

fields.name: PodGroupPolicy
fields.doc: podGroupPolicy defines the configuration for the PodGroup to enable gang-scheduling via supported plugins.

fields.name: Template
fields.doc: template for the JobSet which will be used by TrainJob.

api_types.name: JobSetTemplateSpec
api_types.doc: JobSetTemplateSpec represents a template of the desired JobSet.

fields.name: ObjectMeta
fields.doc: metadata for custom JobSet's labels and annotations. JobSet name and namespace is equal to the TrainJob's name and namespace.

fields.name: Spec
fields.doc: spec of the desired JobSet which will be created from TrainJob.

api_types.name: PodGroupPolicy
api_types.doc: PodGroupPolicy represents a PodGroup configuration for gang-scheduling.

fields.name: PodGroupPolicySource
fields.doc: Configuration for gang-scheduling using various plugins.

api_types.name: PodGroupPolicySource
api_types.doc: PodGroupPolicySource represents supported plugins for gang-scheduling. Only one of its members may be specified.

fields.name: Coscheduling
fields.doc: coscheduling plugin from the Kubernetes scheduler-plugins for gang-scheduling.

fields.name: Volcano
fields.doc: volcano plugin for gang-scheduling.

api_types.name: CoschedulingPodGroupPolicySource
api_types.doc: CoschedulingPodGroupPolicySource represents configuration for coscheduling plugin. The number of min members in the PodGroupSpec is always equal to the number of nodes.

fields.name: ScheduleTimeoutSeconds
fields.doc: scheduleTimeoutSeconds is the maximum duration to schedule PodGroup for gang-scheduling. If the scheduling timeout is equal to 0, the default value is used. Defaults to 60 seconds.

api_types.name: VolcanoPodGroupPolicySource
api_types.doc: VolcanoPodGroupPolicySource represents configuration for the Volcano gang-scheduler.

fields.name: NetworkTopology
fields.doc: networkTopology defines the NetworkTopology config, this field works in conjunction with network topology feature and hyperNode CRD.

api_types.name: MLPolicy
api_types.doc: MLPolicy represents configuration for the model training with ML-specific parameters.

fields.name: NumNodes
fields.doc: numNodes is the number of training nodes. Defaults to 1.

fields.name: MLPolicySource
fields.doc: Configuration for the runtime-specific parameters, such as Torch or MPI. Only one of its members may be specified.

markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!(has(self.numNodes) && (has(self.torch) && has(self.torch.elasticPolicy)))", message="numNodes should not be set if torch.elasticPolicy is configured"
+kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="!(has(self.torch) && has(self.mpi))", message="Only one of the policy can be configured"

api_types.name: MLPolicySource
api_types.doc: MLPolicySource represents the runtime-specific configuration for various technologies. One of the following specs can be set.

fields.name: Torch
fields.doc: torch defines the configuration for the PyTorch runtime.

fields.name: MPI
fields.doc: mpi defines the configuration for the MPI Runtime.

api_types.name: TorchMLPolicySource
api_types.doc: TorchMLPolicySource represents a PyTorch runtime configuration.

fields.name: NumProcPerNode
fields.doc: numProcPerNode is the number of processes per node. This value is inserted into the `--nproc-per-node` argument of the `torchrun` CLI. Supported values: `auto`, `cpu`, `gpu`, or int value. Defaults to `auto`.
markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="self > 0 || self in ['auto', 'cpu', 'gpu']", message="NumProcPerNode must be equal to auto, cpu, gpu, or int value"

fields.name: ElasticPolicy
fields.doc: elasticPolicy defines the Elastic policy for the PyTorch training.

api_types.name: TorchElasticPolicy
api_types.doc: TorchElasticPolicy represents a configuration for the PyTorch elastic training. If this policy is set, the `.spec.numNodes` parameter must be omitted, since min and max node is used to configure the `torchrun` CLI argument: `--nnodes=minNodes:maxNodes`. Only `c10d` backend is supported for the Rendezvous communication.

fields.name: MaxRestarts
fields.doc: maxRestarts defines how many times the training job can be restarted. This value is inserted into the `--max-restarts` argument of the `torchrun` CLI and the `.spec.failurePolicy.maxRestarts` parameter of the training Job.

fields.name: MinNodes
fields.doc: minNodes is the lower limit for the number of nodes to which training job can scale down.

fields.name: MaxNodes
fields.doc: maxNodes is the upper limit for the number of nodes to which training job can scale up.

fields.name: Metrics
fields.doc: metrics which are used to calculate the desired number of nodes. See the individual metric source types for more information about how each type of metric must respond. The HPA will be created to perform auto-scaling. +listType=atomic

api_types.name: MPIMLPolicySource
api_types.doc: MPIMLPolicySource represents a MPI runtime configuration.

fields.name: NumProcPerNode
fields.doc: numProcPerNode is the number of processes per node. This value is equal to the number of slots for each node in the hostfile. Defaults to 1.

fields.name: MPIImplementation
fields.doc: mpiImplementation is the name of the MPI implementation to create the appropriate hostfile. Defaults to OpenMPI.

fields.name: SSHAuthMountPath
fields.doc: sshAuthMountPath is the directory where SSH keys are mounted. Defaults to /root/.ssh.

fields.name: RunLauncherAsNode
fields.doc: runLauncherAsNode defines whether to run training process on the launcher Job. Defaults to false.

api_types.name: ClusterTrainingRuntime
api_types.doc: ClusterTrainingRuntime represents a training runtime which can be referenced as part of `runtimeRef` API in TrainJob. This resource is a cluster-scoped and can be referenced by TrainJob that created in *any* namespace.

fields.name: ObjectMeta
fields.doc: metadata of the ClusterTrainingRuntime.

fields.name: Spec
fields.doc: spec of the ClusterTrainingRuntime.

api_types.name: ClusterTrainingRuntimeList
api_types.doc: ClusterTrainingRuntimeList is a collection of cluster training runtimes.

fields.name: ListMeta
fields.doc: Standard list metadata.

fields.name: Items
fields.doc: List of ClusterTrainingRuntimes.

api_types.name: TrainingRuntime
api_types.doc: TrainingRuntime represents a training runtime which can be referenced as part of `runtimeRef` API in TrainJob. This resource is a namespaced-scoped and can be referenced by TrainJob that created in the *same* namespace as the TrainingRuntime.

fields.name: ObjectMeta
fields.doc: metadata of the TrainingRuntime.

fields.name: Spec
fields.doc: spec of the TrainingRuntime.

api_types.name: TrainingRuntimeList
api_types.doc: TrainingRuntimeList is a collection of training runtimes.

fields.name: ListMeta
fields.doc: Standard list metadata.

fields.name: Items
fields.doc: List of TrainingRuntimes.

api_types.name: RuntimeRef
api_types.doc: RuntimeRef represents the reference to the existing training runtime.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: name of the runtime being referenced. When namespaced-scoped TrainingRuntime is used, the TrainJob must have the same namespace as the deployed runtime.

fields.name: APIGroup
fields.doc: apiGroup of the runtime being referenced. Defaults to `trainer.kubeflow.org`.

fields.name: Kind
fields.doc: kind of the runtime being referenced. Defaults to ClusterTrainingRuntime.

api_types.name: Initializer
api_types.doc: Initializer represents the desired configuration for the dataset and model initialization. It is used to initialize the assets (dataset and pre-trained model) and pre-process data.

fields.name: Dataset
fields.doc: dataset defines the configuration for the dataset initialization and pre-processing.

fields.name: Model
fields.doc: model defines the configuration for the pre-trained model initialization

api_types.name: DatasetInitializer
api_types.doc: DatasetInitializer represents the desired configuration to initialize and pre-process dataset. The DatasetInitializer spec will override the runtime Job template which contains this label: `trainer.kubeflow.org/trainjob-ancestor-step: dataset-initializer`

fields.name: StorageUri
fields.doc: storageUri is the URI for the dataset provider.

fields.name: Env
fields.doc: env is the list of environment variables to set in the dataset initializer container. These values will be merged with the TrainingRuntime's dataset initializer environments. +listType=map +listMapKey=name

fields.name: SecretRef
fields.doc: secretRef is the reference to the secret with credentials to download dataset. Secret must be created in the TrainJob's namespace.

api_types.name: ModelInitializer
api_types.doc: ModelInitializer represents the desired configuration to initialize pre-trained model. The ModelInitializer spec will override the runtime Job template which contains this label: `trainer.kubeflow.org/trainjob-ancestor-step: dataset-initializer`

fields.name: StorageUri
fields.doc: storageUri is the URI for the model provider.

fields.name: Env
fields.doc: env is the list of environment variables to set in the model initializer container. These values will be merged with the TrainingRuntime's model initializer environments. +listType=map +listMapKey=name

fields.name: SecretRef
fields.doc: secretRef is the reference to the secret with credentials to download model. Secret must be created in the TrainJob's namespace.

api_types.name: Trainer
api_types.doc: Trainer represents the desired configuration for the training job. The Trainer spec will override the runtime template which contains this label: `trainer.kubeflow.org/trainjob-ancestor-step: trainer`

fields.name: Image
fields.doc: image is the container image for the training container.

fields.name: Command
fields.doc: command for the entrypoint of the training container. +listType=atomic

fields.name: Args
fields.doc: args for the entrypoint for the training container. +listType=atomic

fields.name: Env
fields.doc: env is the list of environment variables to set in the training container. These values will be merged with the TrainingRuntime's trainer environments. +listType=map +listMapKey=name

fields.name: NumNodes
fields.doc: numNodes is the number of training nodes. TODO (andreyvelich): Do we want to support dynamic num of nodes in TrainJob for PyTorch elastic: `--nnodes=1:4` ?

fields.name: ResourcesPerNode
fields.doc: resourcesPerNode defines the compute resources for each training node.

fields.name: NumProcPerNode
fields.doc: numProcPerNode is the number of processes/workers/slots on every training node. For the Torch runtime: `auto`, `cpu`, `gpu`, or int value can be set. For the MPI runtime only int value can be set.

api_types.name: PodTemplateOverride
api_types.doc: PodTemplateOverride represents a custom PodTemplateSpec override that will be applied to the TrainJob's training runtime.

fields.name: TargetJobs
fields.doc: targetJobs is the list of replicated jobs in the training runtime template to apply the overrides. +listType=atomic

fields.name: Metadata
fields.doc: metadata overrides the Pod template metadata. These values will be merged with the TrainingRuntime's Pod template metadata.

fields.name: Spec
fields.doc: spec overrides the Pod template spec. These values will be merged with the TrainingRuntime's Pod template spec.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: name is the target training job name for which the PodTemplateSpec is overridden.

api_types.name: PodTemplateSpecOverride
api_types.doc: PodTemplateSpecOverride represents the spec overrides for Pod template.

fields.name: ServiceAccountName
fields.doc: serviceAccountName overrides the service account.

fields.name: NodeSelector
fields.doc: nodeSelector overrides the node selector to place Pod on the specific node.

fields.name: Affinity
fields.doc: affinity overrides for the Pod's affinity.

fields.name: Tolerations
fields.doc: tolerations overrides the Pod's tolerations. +listType=atomic

fields.name: Volumes
fields.doc: volumes overrides the Pod's volumes. +listType=map +listMapKey=name

fields.name: InitContainers
fields.doc: initContainers overrides the init container in the target job templates. +listType=map +listMapKey=name

fields.name: Containers
fields.doc: containers overrides for the containers in the target job templates. +listType=map +listMapKey=name

fields.name: SchedulingGates
fields.doc: schedulingGates overrides the scheduling gates of the Pods in the target job templates. More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/scheduling-eviction/pod-scheduling-readiness/ +listType=map +listMapKey=name

fields.name: ImagePullSecrets
fields.doc: imagePullSecrets overrides the image pull secrets for the Pods in the target job templates. +listType=map +listMapKey=name

api_types.name: ContainerOverride
api_types.doc: ContainerOverride represents parameters that can be overridden using PodSpecOverrides.

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: name for the container. TrainingRuntime must have this container.

fields.name: Env
fields.doc: env is the list of environment variables to set in the container. These values will be merged with the TrainingRuntime's environments. These values can't be set for container with the name: `node`, `dataset-initializer`, or `model-initializer`. For those containers the envs can only be set via Trainer or Initializer APIs. +listType=map +listMapKey=name

fields.name: VolumeMounts
fields.doc: volumeMounts are the volumes to mount into the container's filesystem. +listType=map +listMapKey=name

api_types.name: TrainJobStatus
api_types.doc: TrainJobStatus represents the current status of TrainJob.

fields.name: Conditions
fields.doc: conditions for the TrainJob. +listType=map +listMapKey=type

fields.name: JobsStatus
fields.doc: jobsStatus tracks the child Jobs in TrainJob. +listType=map +listMapKey=name

fields.name: Name
fields.doc: name of the child Job.

fields.name: Ready
fields.doc: ready is the number of child Jobs where the number of ready pods and completed pods is greater than or equal to the total expected pod count for the child Job.

fields.name: Succeeded
fields.doc: succeeded is the number of successfully completed child Jobs.

fields.name: Failed
fields.doc: failed is the number of failed child Jobs.

fields.name: Active
fields.doc: active is the number of child Jobs with at least 1 pod in a running or pending state which are not marked for deletion.

fields.name: Suspended
fields.doc: suspended is the number of child Jobs which are in a suspended state.

api_types.name: TrainJob
api_types.doc: TrainJob represents configuration of a training job.

fields.name: ObjectMeta
fields.doc: metadata of the TrainJob.

fields.name: Spec
fields.doc: spec of the TrainJob.

fields.name: Status
fields.doc: status of TrainJob.

api_types.name: TrainJobList
api_types.doc: TrainJobList is a collection of training jobs.

fields.name: ListMeta
fields.doc: Standard list metadata.

fields.name: Items
fields.doc: List of TrainJobs.

api_types.name: TrainJobSpec
api_types.doc: TrainJobSpec represents specification of the desired TrainJob.

fields.name: RuntimeRef
fields.doc: runtimeRef is the reference to the training runtime. The field is immutable.

fields.name: Initializer
fields.doc: initializer defines the configuration of the initializer.

fields.name: Trainer
fields.doc: trainer defines the configuration of the trainer.

fields.name: Labels
fields.doc: labels to apply for the derivative JobSet and Jobs. They will be merged with the TrainingRuntime values.

fields.name: Annotations
fields.doc: annotations to apply for the derivative JobSet and Jobs. They will be merged with the TrainingRuntime values.

fields.name: PodTemplateOverrides
fields.doc: podTemplateOverrides define the PodTemplateOverrides for the training runtime. When multiple overrides apply to the same targetJob, later entries in the slice override earlier field values. +listType=atomic

fields.name: Suspend
fields.doc: suspend defines whether to suspend the running TrainJob. Defaults to false.

fields.name: ManagedBy
fields.doc: managedBy is used to indicate the controller or entity that manages a TrainJob. The value must be either an empty, `trainer.kubeflow.org/trainjob-controller` or `kueue.x-k8s.io/multikueue`. The built-in TrainJob controller reconciles TrainJob which don't have this field at all or the field value is the reserved string `trainer.kubeflow.org/trainjob-controller`, but delegates reconciling TrainJobs with a 'kueue.x-k8s.io/multikueue' to the Kueue. The field is immutable. Defaults to `trainer.kubeflow.org/trainjob-controller`
markers: +kubebuilder:validation:XValidation:rule="self in ['trainer.kubeflow.org/trainjob-controller', 'kueue.x-k8s.io/multikueue']", message="ManagedBy must be trainer.kubeflow.org/trainjob-controller or kueue.x-k8s.io/multikueue if set"

summary: trainer is a Kubernetes component. managing 3 CRD(s): ClusterTrainingRuntime, TrainingRuntime, TrainJob. deploying 4 workload(s) (kubeflow-trainer-controller-manager, kubeflow-trainer-controller-manager, kubeflow-trainer-controller-manager, kubeflow-trainer-controller-manager) with 4 container(s). defining 4 API spec type(s) across 36 struct(s) with 114 total fields. following 1 reconciliation steps across 1 controller(s).

webhooks.name: validator.clustertrainingruntime.trainer.kubeflow.org
webhooks.purpose: Validates ClusterTrainingRuntime resources on create and update by checking that the replicated jobs in the runtime spec are well-formed, and warns on create if the runtime is marked as deprecated via labels.

webhooks.name: validator.trainjob.trainer.kubeflow.org
webhooks.purpose: Validates TrainJob resources on create and update by resolving the referenced runtime from a registry and delegating to that runtime's ValidateObjects method, rejecting requests that reference an unsupported runtime or fail runtime-specific validation rules.

webhooks.name: validator.trainingruntime.trainer.kubeflow.org
webhooks.purpose: Validates TrainingRuntime resources on create, ensuring that each ReplicatedJob tagged with a known ancestor label (trainer, model-initializer, dataset-initializer) has exactly 1 replica and contains the required container name for that ancestor. Update and delete are no-ops.
